---
title: "第5章　市場反応分析 (I)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
setwd("C:/Users/unit/Desktop")
```

## 回帰分析の実行

```{r}
data <- read.table("sales-price-promo.txt", header = TRUE)
head(data)
result.lm <- lm(売上~価格, data = data)
summary(result.lm)
```
